# altinity_zones (Data Source)

List the availability zones available in an environment (GET /cloud/{environment}/options?type=zones). Use for a cluster azlist or a keeper's zones.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# List availability zones in an environment (for cluster azlist / keeper zones).
data "altinity_zones" "this" {
  environment = data.altinity_environment.this.id
  platform    = data.altinity_environment.this.type
}

output "zones" {
  value = data.altinity_zones.this.zones
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment` (String) ACM environment id to list zones for.

### Optional

- `platform` (String) Platform to query (e.g. kubernetes). Pass the environment's `type`.

### Read-Only

- `zones` (List of String) The available availability-zone names.
